message:
test(reply): add 41 tests for terminal query/reply engine (bd-113jw)

Coverage for parse_escape edge cases (too short, wrong prefix,
unknown final byte), DECRPM parsing (mode 0, u16::MAX, overflow,
non-digit, missing ?/$, empty mode), DA1/DA2 parse variants,
DSR unknown params, ReplyEngine identity (xterm_like, default),
cursor position encoding (origin, large values, u16::MAX saturation,
extended format), custom DA2 identity, all DECRPM supported modes
(1/6/7/1000/1002/1049/2004/2026), unknown mode status 0, modes=None
context, query_from_action for all Action variants, reply_for_action
None/Some cases, wrapper API delegation, and DA1 constant format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
